MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) AS TO DEFENDANT PAZ PORTILLO, EMERSON IVAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY IRENE GUERRERO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT EMERSON IVAN PAZ PORTILLO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAZ PORTILLO, EMERSON IVAN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,680.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
